channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [KIRLOSIND] KFIL Merger Scheme: NCLT Final Hearing Set for May 15, 2026
item.description:
Kirloskar Industries Ltd (KIL) has informed about an update from its material subsidiary, Kirloskar Ferrous Industries Limited (KFIL). KFIL has announced that the National Company Law Tribunal (NCLT), Mumbai Bench, has scheduled the final hearing for the Scheme of Arrangement and Merger by Absorption. The scheme involves the merger of Oliver Engineering Private Limited and Adicca Energy Solutions Private Limited with Kirloskar Ferrous Industries Limited. The final hearing is set for May 15, 2026. A notice regarding this hearing was published in Financial Express and Loksatta on April 20, 2026. The joint company scheme petition was presented on April 6, 2026, and admitted by the NCLT on April 9, 2026.

  • KFIL's merger scheme with Oliver Engineering and Adicca Energy is progressing.
  • NCLT Mumbai Bench has scheduled the final hearing for May 15, 2026.
  • The scheme involves merger by absorption of two companies into KFIL.
  • Public notice of the final hearing was published on April 20, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Kirloskar Industries Ltd | Category: Merger

item.title: [KEI] KEI Industries awarded ISO/IEC 27001:2022 certification
item.description:
KEI Industries Limited has been awarded the ISO/IEC 27001:2022 certification for its Information Security Management System (ISMS) by INTERCERT INC. This certification validates the company's robust framework for systematically identifying, assessing, and managing information security risks across its operations. The certified ISMS covers the management, operation, and protection of information assets, IT infrastructure, enterprise applications, and supporting business processes. This ensures the confidentiality, integrity, and availability of information for corporate and operational activities. The certification applies to multiple sites, including New Delhi and Bhiwadi, Rajasthan, underscoring KEI's commitment to high information security standards.

  • KEI Industries received ISO/IEC 27001:2022 certification.
  • Certification covers Information Security Management System (ISMS).
  • Validates robust risk management for information assets and IT.
  • Ensures confidentiality, integrity, and availability of information.
  • Applies to key operational sites in New Delhi and Bhiwadi.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: KEI INDUSTRIES LTD. | Category: Business Update

item.title: [SYSTMTXC] Systematix Board to meet Apr 29 for FY26 results & dividend
item.description:
Systematix Corporate Services Ltd has announced that its Board of Directors will convene on April 29, 2026. The primary agenda includes considering and approving the standalone and consolidated audited financial results for the quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026. Additionally, the Board will consider recommending a final dividend for FY26, subject to shareholder approval. In compliance with insider trading regulations, the trading window for the company's securities has been closed since April 1, 2026, and will reopen 48 hours after the financial results are announced. Furthermore, PANs of key personnel and their relatives have been frozen for trading during this period.

  • Board meeting scheduled for April 29, 2026.
  • To consider and approve Q4 and FY26 financial results.
  • To recommend final dividend for the financial year ended March 31, 2026.
  • Trading window closed from April 1, 2026, until 48 hours post-results.
  • PANs of insiders frozen for trading during the window closure.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: SYSTEMATIX CORPORATE SERVICES LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [PNCINFRA] PNC Infratech bags ₹3483 Cr highway projects in Uttar Pradesh
item.description:
🔥 Trending

PNC Infratech Ltd has secured two new highway construction projects in Uttar Pradesh, operating on a Hybrid Annuity Mode (HAM). The aggregate bid project cost for these two projects is ₹3483 crore, excluding GST. Each project involves the construction of a 4-lane highway on NH-927. The company is required to execute each project within a period of twenty-four months. The company also confirmed no promoter or related party interest in the awarding entity and that the transactions are not related party transactions.

  • Secured two 4-lane highway projects in Uttar Pradesh.
  • Total project cost is ₹3483 crore, excluding GST.
  • Projects to be executed on Hybrid Annuity Mode (HAM).
  • Each project has a 24-month completion timeline.
  • No related party transactions or promoter interest involved.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: PNC Infratech Ltd | Category: Project Update

item.title: [TATAELXSI] Tata Elxsi Q4 FY26 Revenue ₹993.8 Cr, up 4.2% QoQ
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Tata Elxsi announced its Q4 FY26 results, reporting operating revenue of ₹993.8 Cr, a healthy 4.2% QoQ growth. Full-year revenue stood at ₹3,757.4 Cr. The company achieved an EBITDA of ₹244.6 Cr (up 10.0% QoQ) with a 24.6% margin. Profit Before Tax (PBT) grew 10.7% QoQ and 20.9% YoY to ₹267.8 Cr, with a 25.6% margin. Profit After Tax (PAT) saw significant growth of 23.1% QoQ and 27.8% YoY, reaching ₹220.4 Cr. The Board recommended a final dividend of ₹75 per equity share (750%) for FY26. The Media & Communications business grew 5.6% QoQ, securing new strategic deals. The Transportation business also secured multi-year deals, with OEM business now representing 77% of its revenue. Tata Elxsi launched an Offshore Development Centre for Terumo and accelerated enterprise-wide GenAI adoption, enhancing innovation and operational efficiency.

  • Q4 FY26 operating revenue grew 4.2% QoQ to ₹993.8 Cr.
  • PBT surged 10.7% QoQ and 20.9% YoY, achieving 25.6% margin.
  • PAT increased 23.1% QoQ and 27.8% YoY to ₹220.4 Cr.
  • Board recommended a final dividend of ₹75 per equity share.
  • Media & Communications business grew 5.6% QoQ, securing new deals.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: TATA ELXSI LTD. | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [KIZI] Kizi Apparels receives \u20b911.62 Lacs for 2nd tranche of warrants
item.description:
Kizi Apparels Ltd's Board of Directors, in a meeting held on April 21, 2026, approved the receipt of the second tranche of consideration for convertible warrants. The company received \u20b911,62,500 from Ms. Suchitra Nathani. These warrants were issued at a price of \u20b915.50 each (including a premium of \u20b95.50) on a preferential basis to persons/entities belonging to the Promoter/Promoter Group and public category, in accordance with SEBI (ICDR) Regulations, 2018.

  • Kizi Apparels received \u20b911.62 Lacs as 2nd tranche for warrants.
  • Funds from Ms. Suchitra Nathani for preferential warrants.
  • Warrants issued at \u20b915.50 each (\u20b910 FV + \u20b95.50 premium).
  • Receipt of funds approved by Board on April 21, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Kizi Apparels Ltd | Category: Investment

item.title: [GEETANJ] Geetanjali Credit: New MD & Additional Director Appointed
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Geetanjali Credit and Capital Ltd's Board of Directors met on April 21, 2026, to announce significant management changes. The company reported the unfortunate demise of its Managing Director, Mr. Vitthal Kumar Jajoo, on the same day. Concurrently, the Board appointed Mr. Dharmendra Hasmukhbhai Vyas (DIN: 11668470) as the new Managing Director, effective April 21, 2026, to fill the casual vacancy. Mr. Vyas brings over 10 years of experience in accountancy. Additionally, Ms. Kamlaben Salvi (DIN: 11668477) was appointed as an Additional Non-Executive Director, also effective April 21, 2026. Ms. Salvi has over 5 years of experience in the field of accountancy. These appointments are in accordance with SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015.

  • Mr. Vitthal Kumar Jajoo, the Managing Director, passed away on April 21, 2026.
  • Mr. Dharmendra Hasmukhbhai Vyas appointed as new Managing Director.
  • Ms. Kamlaben Salvi appointed as Additional Non-Executive Director.
  • Both new appointments are effective from April 21, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Geetanjali Credit and Capital Ltd | Category: Management Change

item.title: [AANCHALISP] Aanchal Ispat Board to meet Apr 27 for Q4/FY26 results & fund-raise
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Aanchal Ispat Ltd. announced a Board Meeting on April 27, 2026, to consider and approve its Standalone Audited financial results for the quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026. Additionally, the Board will discuss a proposal for fund-raising, which may include issuing equity shares, equity-linked instruments, convertible preference shares, or warrants through various modes like Private Placement, Qualified Institutions Placements (QIPs), or a further public issue, subject to necessary approvals.

  • Board meeting scheduled for April 27, 2026.
  • To approve Q4 and FY26 standalone audited financial results.
  • To consider fund-raising via equity or equity-linked instruments.
  • Fund-raising options include QIP, private placement, or public issue.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Aanchal Ispat Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [UNIVPHOTO] NCLAT dismisses shareholder appeal against Universus Photo Imagings Ltd
item.description:
Universus Photo Imagings Ltd announced that the National Company Law Appellate Tribunal (NCLAT) dismissed an appeal filed by shareholder Mr. Ankit Jain. The appeal challenged an earlier order from the National Company Law Tribunal (NCLT) dated October 15, 2025, which was in the company's favor. With the NCLAT's dismissal on April 16, 2026, the NCLT's favorable order remains operative. The company noted the NCLAT order, which has no financial implications or identified non-compliances. No further action is required by the company.

  • NCLAT dismissed a shareholder's appeal against Universus Photo Imagings Ltd.
  • The NCLT order from October 2025, favorable to the company, remains in force.
  • The dismissal of the appeal has no financial implications for the company.
  • No further action is required by the company regarding this legal matter.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Universus Photo Imagings Ltd | Category: Legal

item.title: [HCLTECH] HCL Tech Q4 FY26 Profit ₹4,490 Cr; Declares ₹24/Share Dividend
item.description:
HCL Technologies Ltd's Board of Directors approved the audited consolidated and standalone financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026. For Q4 FY26, the company reported a profit of ₹4,490 crore. For the full financial year 2025-26, the profit stood at ₹16,652 crore. Concurrently, the Board declared an an interim dividend of ₹24 per equity share (face value ₹2) for the financial year 2026-27. The record date for this dividend is April 25, 2026, with payment scheduled for May 5, 2026. The board meeting considering these approvals concluded on April 21, 2026.

  • HCL Tech declared an interim dividend of ₹24 per share for FY27.
  • Q4 FY26 consolidated profit for the period was ₹4,490 crore.
  • Full-year FY26 consolidated profit reached ₹16,652 crore.
  • Dividend record date is April 25, 2026, payment by May 5, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: HCL TECHNOLOGIES LTD. | Category: Quarterly Result
